prompt.positive:
A photorealistic image-to-video continuation of the provided frame. Start exactly from the open frosted serum bottle on the right, the angled glass dropper suspended above and to its left, the single clear serum drop hanging from the pipette tip, and the whole and cut black truffles resting on the white surface. Preserve the bottle and pipette silhouettes, open threaded neck, gold collar, white bulb, pale serum level, readable “GRACEFACE RUSSIA,” “TRUFFLE EXTRACT,” “Face serum,” and “30 ml” label text, truffle illustration, exact item count and placement, glass transparency, reflections, shadows, light gray studio background, original composition and aspect ratio.

The first frame already shows one serum drop suspended from the pipette tip. During the clip, that same drop completes one tiny downward stretch under gravity and settles into a stable pendant shape without detaching. By the final frames, the drop and the entire product arrangement are calm and steady.

Keep the camera locked and the original composition stable. Preserve the full main subject and all key scene elements in frame. No zoom, orbit, pan, tilt or reframing.

Generate a single-shot video. Natural studio lighting and colors, realistic gravity and liquid surface tension, coherent glass and product geometry, smooth temporal consistency, stable fine details, photorealistic motion.
prompt.negative: Product rotation or transformation, the existing pendant drop detaching or multiplying, invented drops, bottle or pipette movement, opening or closing the package, changed item count, altered or unreadable label text, replaced branding, warped bottle neck or pipette, opaque glass, inconsistent refraction, changing liquid volume, detached reflections, changing shadow contact, zoom, pan, tilt, reframing, crop, flicker, morphing, duplication, motion artifacts, cartoon or CGI look
